title: Narrative Profile — Canonical Summary
description: Profile overlay schema for the canonical summary: a deterministic, enum-constrained, registry-bound representation of the fabula layer. All entity references are registry slugs. The render/parse round-trip contract guarantees: parse(render(summary, registry), registry) == summary. This is the CAP equivalent of the fabula/syuzhet separation — what happens (canonical summary) vs. how it's told (prose + craft layer).

pov_character.description: Registry character slug for the POV/focalizer character.

event_type.description: Scene-level event category. Maps to a deterministic verb phrase in the rendered summary.

participants.description: Registry character slugs for other participants (excluding POV character). Empty array if POV character acts alone.

location.description: Registry setting slug for the scene location.

want.description: Registry want_vocabulary slug for the POV character's scene-want.

want_outcome.description: Whether the POV character's want was satisfied.

stakes_domain.description: Domain of stakes at risk in this scene.

atmosphere.description: Scene atmosphere/emotional register. Uses the tone enum.

causal_role.description: How this scene functions causally in the plot.

$comment: Render template: '{pov_label} {event_verb} {participants} at {location_label}; wants {want_label} [{WANT_OUTCOME}]; stakes={stakes_domain}, atmosphere={atmosphere}, role={causal_role}.' — See scripts/summary_template.py for the render/parse contract.
